---
title : "Stability and Comparability of Meritocratic Beliefs in School-Age Students: A Measurement Invariance Approach across Time and Cohorts"
date : "2026-01-01"
author : "Laffert, Andreas; Castillo, Juan Carlos; Canales-Selles, Rene; Urzua, Tomas & Carrasco, Kevin"
categories : ["Presentation"]
publication : " ACMME . Chile"
publication_short : " ACMME . Chile"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Laffert, Andreas; Castillo, Juan Carlos; Canales-Selles, Rene; Urzua, Tomas & Carrasco, Kevin (2026). *Stability and Comparability of Meritocratic Beliefs in School-Age Students: A Measurement Invariance Approach across Time and Cohorts*.  ACMME . Chile

:::
